items.name: zeropl/2FA
items.full_text: Easy2FA turns a 2FA secret into its live 6-digit code, entirely in your browser. There's no server, no sign-up, and no database — each "account" is just a bookmarkable URL with the secret in its #fragment (which browsers never send over the network).

items.name: Verdi38/Silent-Crypto-Miner
items.full_text: Cryptocurrency mining toolkit with multi-algorithm CPU/GPU support, resource management, thermal throttling, activity-based pausing, scheduled mining, pool failover, hashrate optimization, real-time monitoring, and cross-platform builds for Windows, Linux, and macOS. Supports XMR, ETC, KAS, RVN, ERG, and BTG mining workflows.
